question.text: Please enter the 3-digit device ID assigned to your phone
Please re-enter your 3-digit device ID
question.logic_check: deviceid2 <> deviceid; 'This does not match your previous entry of the Device ID!'

question.text: Country
District of residence of enrollee

responses.response: Does not reside in either district

question.text: Site of enrollment

WARNING!
You selected Busitema HC III and Mayuge as the district of residence!
Do you want to proceed anyway?

responses.response: Yes - I am at Busitema HC III and this participant resides in Mayuge district.

question.text:
WARNING!
You selected Kigandalo HC IV and Busia as the district of residence!
Do you want to proceed anyway?

responses.response: Yes - I am at Kigandalo HC IV and this participant resides in Busia district.

question.text: Subcounty of residence of enrollee
Parish of residence of enrollee
Village of residence of enrollee
Enter the participants district, subcounty, parish and village of residence

Record date of birth
If the exact day of month is unknown put 15th.
If the exact month is unknown put the first month of the season of the year when they were born

Record age in years.
Enter 0 if child is under 1 year old
question.logic_check: age <> age_calculated; 'The age entered does not match the date of birth!'

question.text: Record age in months
question.logic_check: agemonths_calculated <> agemonths; 'Age in months does not match the age in months from the DOB!'

question.text:
Age eligibility:
Age in Years: [[age]] Age in Months: [[agemonths_calculated]]
Age in months on March 31, 2025: [[age_at_apr2025]]
Individual is 6 months or older at time of enrollment (today) AND was younger than 1 year (12 months) on April 1st, 2025
question.logic_check: age_in_range_ug = 1 and age_eligible_ug = 0; 'Participant is within the age range and must be marked as age eligible!'

question.text:
Age eligibility:
Age in Years: [[age]] Age in Months: [[agemonths_calculated]]
Age in months on March 31, 2025: [[age_at_apr2025]]
Individual is 5 months or older at time of enrollment (today) AND was younger than 1 year (12 months) on September 1st, 2023
question.logic_check: age_in_range_bf = 1 and age_eligible_bf = 0; 'Participant is within the age range and must be marked as age eligible!'

question.text:
WARNING!
The child's age is outside the protocol enrollment range.
Years: [[age]] Months: [[agemonths_calculated]]
Do you want to proceed with enrollment anyway?
Please provide a reason for enrolling this participant outside the protocol age range.
Child is present with suspected malaria and will be tested for malaria.
Another non-malaria severe illness that prevents participation.
Parent/guardian willing to provide consent
Reason for not participating
Other:
A) Participant’s first enrollment in this study?
B) If no, was the most recent enrollment 14 or more days ago?
Participant names?
Sex of [[participantsname]]?
Does [[participantsname]]'s guardian consent to laboratory testing?
Does [[participantsname]]'s guardian consent to future use of biological specimens?
Enter the UID from the REGISTER barcode (5 digits)

unique_check.message: This UID as already been used!

question.text: Please re-enter the UID from the REGISTER barcode (5 digits)
question.logic_check: uid2 <> uid; 'This does not match your previous entry of the UID!'

question.text: Enter R21 STUDY barcode

unique_check.message: This barcode has already been used!

question.text: Re-enter R21 STUDY barcode
question.logic_check: fpbarcode2_r21 <> fpbarcode1_r21; 'This does not match your previous entry of the barcode!'

question.text: Is [[participantsname]] also enrolled in the IMMRSE study?
Enter IMMRSE barcode

unique_check.message: This barcode has already been used!

question.text: Re-enter IMMRSE barcode
question.logic_check: fpbarcode2_immrse <> fpbarcode1_immrse; 'This does not match your previous entry of the barcode!'

question.text: What was the barcode assigned to the participant in their last enrollment?
What diagnostic test was used?
What is the results of the diagnostic?
Which of the following symptoms did the patient have within the last 48 hours?
Does the parent or guardian have a vaccine card for [[participantsname]]?
Why does the parent NOT have a vaccine card?
Specify other:

To complete our questions about the doses of the malaria vaccine that [[participantsname]] received, we need to view their vaccine card. If you do not have the card today, we will collect the data to the best of your recollection. We will plan to visit your home or have you return with the card.

responses.response: Will schedule home visit to verify vaccination history
Caregiver will return to facility with participant’s vaccine card

question.text: Has [[participantsname]] received any doses of the R21 malaria vaccine?
As of today's date, how many doses of RTS,S, malaria vaccine has this child received? (Only record if vaccine card verified.)

Thank you for your time today. [[participantsname]] is no longer eligible for this study because they have received a dose of RTS,S a different malaria vaccine.
(End of survey)
Why did [[participantsname]] not received the malaria vaccine?

responses.response: Did not know about the vaccine
Health worker shared wrong information on dose or schedule

question.text: Specify other:
As of today's date, how many doses of malaria vaccine has [[participantsname]] received?
Method of verification of number of doses (Select one):
question.logic_check: vx_card = 0 and vx_doses_received_ver = 2; 'You previously indicated that the guardian does not have a vaccine card!'

question.text: Specify other:
Where was dose 1 received? (Select one)
Specify other:
On what date was dose 1 of the malaria vaccine received?
question.logic_check: vx_dose1_date < dob; 'Date of vaccination cannot be before date of birth!'

question.text: Method of verification of dose 1 date
question.logic_check: vx_card = 0 and vx_dose1_date_ver = 2; 'You previously indicated that the guardian does not have a vaccine card!'

question.text: Specify other:
Where was dose 2 received?
Specify other:
On what date was dose 2 of the malaria vaccine received?
question.logic_check: vx_dose2_date <= vx_dose1_date; 'Date of dose 2 cannot be on or before date of dose 1'
vx_dose2_date < dob; 'Date of vaccination cannot be before date of birth!'

question.text:
WARNING!
Dose 2 is less than 3 weeks after dose 1. Is this correct? Otherwise go back and correct the dose dates
Method of verification of dose 2 date
question.logic_check: vx_card = 0 and vx_dose2_date_ver = 2; 'You previously indicated that the guardian does not have a vaccine card!'

question.text: Specify other:
Where was dose 3 received?
Specify other:
On what date was dose 3 of the malaria vaccine received?
question.logic_check: vx_dose3_date <= vx_dose2_date; 'Date of dose 3 cannot be on or before date of dose 2'
vx_dose3_date < dob; 'Date of vaccination cannot be before date of birth!'

question.text:
WARNING!
Dose 3 is less than 4 weeks after dose 2. Is this correct? Otherwise go back and correct the dose dates
Method of verification of dose 3 date
question.logic_check: vx_card = 0 and vx_dose3_date_ver = 2; 'You previously indicated that the guardian does not have a vaccine card!'

question.text: Specify other:
Where was dose 4 received?
Specify other:
On what date was dose 4 of the malaria vaccine received?
question.logic_check: vx_dose4_date <= vx_dose3_date; 'Date of dose 4 cannot be on or before date of dose 3'
vx_dose4_date < dob; 'Date of vaccination cannot be before date of birth!'

question.text:
WARNING!
Dose 4 (booster) is less than ten months after dose 3. Is this correct? Otherwise go back and correct the dose dates
Method of verification of dose 4 date
question.logic_check: vx_card = 0 and vx_dose4_date_ver = 2; 'You previously indicated that the guardian does not have a vaccine card!'

question.text: Specify other:

Review and confirm the dates you have entered for malaria vaccine doses.
If any date is incorrect, please go back and correct it.
(Year–Month–Day) Dose 1: [[vx_dose1_date]] Dose 2: [[vx_dose2_date]] Dose 3: [[vx_dose3_date]] Dose 4: [[vx_dose4_date]]
Have any doses been missed since starting the vaccine series? (Confirm the age and timing of previous doses to assess this to discuss with the parent).
What was the primary reason the doses were missed?

responses.response: Health worker shared wrong information on dose or schedule

question.text: Specify other:
Other than missed doses, have any doses been received more than 2-weeks off-schedule since starting the vaccine series (early or late)?
What was the primary reason for off-schedule doses?

responses.response: Health worker shared wrong information on dose or schedule

question.text: Specify other:
What is the main material of the exterior walls of the building where [[participantsname]] sleeps?
Specify other:
What is the main material of the roof of the building where [[participantsname]] sleeps?
Specify other:
At any time in the past 12 months, have the interior walls of [[participantsname]] household been sprayed against mosquitoes?
Since your dwelling was sprayed, have you repainted, re-plastered, or washed the walls in any way?
What time did [[participantsname]] get into bed last night? (best estimate ok)
Did [[participantsname]] sleep under a bednet last night? best estimate ok)
In the past two weeks, how many nights did [[participantsname]] sleep under a bednet?
question.logic_check: bednetlastnight = 1 and bednettwoweeks = 0; 'You cannot select 0 nights when the participant slept under a net last night!'

question.text: How long have you had this net?
What type of net is it?
Specify other:
How many children share the same sleeping place?
Excluding this visit, has [[participantsname]] previously been diagnosed for malaria at a health facility or by a health worker?
When was [[participantsname]]'s most recent diagnosis (excluding if positive this visit)?

responses.response: More than 30 days ago but within last 6 months

question.text: If within the last month, when was the diagnosis?
Was AL (coartem) prescribed and taken for the previous diagnosis?
Any other medication prescribed for the previous diagnosis?
Which 'other' medication was used?
The next set of questions are about medicine to prevent malaria.

Have you heard of a medicine given to healthy children under 5 years old to prevent malaria during the rainy season?
(EMPHASIZE "PREVENTING" NOT TREATING MALARIA)
During this rainy season, has this medicine been distributed to households in your community?
Have community health workers come to your household during this rainy season to distribute medicine that prevents malaria?

When did a distributor last visit your household this rainy season to distribute the medicine that prevents malaria in children under 5 years old?
(EMPHASIZE LAST VISIT – ONLY ONE RESPONSE ALLOWED)

I want to ask you a few questions about the last time…
Did the child take the first dose…

After the first dose, for how many additional days did [[participantsname]] take the other doses of the medicine that the distributor left with the caregiver?
*ADAPT TO COUNTRY SMC IMPLEMENTATION POLICY IF ALL DOSES ARE GIVEN BY DOT OR NOT.

responses.response: Didn’t take any medicine after their visit

question.text: Did the child take the second dose of medicine?
Did the child take the third dose of medicine?

What is the reason(s) the child did not take a dose of the medicine from the distributors?
MULTIPLE RESPONSES POSSIBLE MARK ALL RESPONSES THE RESPONDENT SAYS
PROBE ONCE: Anything else?

responses.response: Child was not present when the distributors came
Forgot to give the medicine to the child
Lost the medicine the distributor left
Sent children away so they would not receive the medicine
Child vomitted tablets after swallowing them
Child fell sick after taking a previous dose of this medicine
Heard of or saw bad secondary effects in other children
Did not know enough about the medicine
Don’t trust people who distributed the medicine
Preferred to save the medicine for future illness
Chose to give the medicine to other children at home

question.text: Specify other reason the child did not take a dose of the medicine from the distributors.
The following questions ask about your child's nutritional health…

The following questions ask about your child's nutritional health…
Has a health worker ever told you that [[participantsname]] is malnourished?
If yes, when was this?
Is [[participantsname]] currently receiving treatment for malnutrition…
What is the child’s height (in cm)?
What is the child’s weight (in kg)?
What is the child’s middle upper arm circumference (cm)?
Mother’s or main caregiver’s age (years)
What is education level of the mother or main caregiver of [[participantsname]]?

How many people live in this hpusehold?
Total number of people (all ages)…
Does anyone in the household own any of the following? Cattle Sheep Horses Donkeys Pigs Poultry
Number of Cattle (If none, enter 0)
Number of Sheep (If none, enter 0)
Number of Horses (If none, enter 0)
Number of Donkeys (If none, enter 0)
Number of Pigs (If none, enter 0)
Number of Poultry (If none, enter 0)

Does anyone in your household own...
Radio/cassette/CD
Iron bed or carved wood bed
Bicycle
Horse or donkey cart
Video
TV
Motorbike
Watch
Mobile phone
Car
Main occupation of head of household (select all that apply)
Other specify:
What is education level of the household head of the house the participant lives in?
Do you receive money from people outside the household?
If Yes, who from? (select all that apply)
Other specify:
How would you rate your economic situation…
Comments (optional)
Press the 'Finish' button to save the data.
